title: BlockDisplayer
body:
# BlockDisplayer
Convert blocks to block displays!

## What does it do??
This plugin (or mod) helps you create creations with block displays.

The block display is very optimized than the falling blocks and can be moved more easily.

If you want to understand how to use it and know how to utilize it, watch this [video](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/omVz6VtFtQo?si=MulIG1FjfpMZan8V&controls=0&start=16) (The subtitles are in Korean, but you'll probably be able to understand them).

## Requirements
Install WorldEdit plugin (or mod).

## How to use
### Simple Mode (`//mode simple`)
1. Select region with WorldEdit.
2. Type `//display <tag>`.
3. Try moving block display with `/execute as @e[tag=<tag>] at @s run tp ~0.2 ~ ~`.

### Advanced Mode (`//mode advanced`, after 1.4)
1. Set center position with `//displaycenter <x> <y> <z>`.
2. Select region with WorldEdit.
3. Type `//display <tag>`
4. Try rotating block display with `/execute as @e[tag=<tag>] at @s run tp @s ~ ~ ~ ~15 ~`
